cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste, sir. Welcome to Standard Chartered Bank. My name is Rohan, and I'll be happy to assist you today. How can I help you, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hi Rohan, ji. My debit card is lost. I need to block it and get a new one issued.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, sir. Sorry to hear that. Can you please confirm your date of birth and registered mobile number for verification purposes?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai. My date of birth is 12th February 1990, and my mobile number is 9812345678.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you, sir. I've verified your details. Now, I'll go ahead and block your card. You will receive a confirmation SMS on your registered mobile number.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds good. What's the process for getting a new card?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, a new card will be issued and dispatched to your registered address within 7-10 working days. You will also receive an SMS with the dispatch details.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Alright, got it. Thank you, Rohan.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, sir. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: No, that's all. Thanks again.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, sir. Have a great day, and feel free to reach out if you need any further assistance.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, Rohan. You too, bye.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, just to confirm, you will receive an email with the details of the new card issuance process.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, thanks for letting me know.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, sir. We're committed to providing you with the best possible service.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, thanks.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, if you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out to us.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, will do.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, sir. We appreciate your business and look forward to serving you better in the future.

scenario_info.description: Reporting a Lost Card: A legitimate agent guides the user through the process of blocking their lost debit card and issuing a new one, following all correct verification steps.
